title: Wild Harvest
writer: Houston Branch, John Monks Jr., Tay Garnett
actors: Alan Ladd, Dorothy Lamour, Robert Preston
plot: Joe is the head of an itinerant combine crew, working the harvests against rival crew boss Alperson. Joe's buddy Jim joins the crew with startup money. Farmer's niece Fay falls for Joe. He puts her off. To get back she marries Jim...
